content: Upload logos with a transparent background (PNG, SVG, JPG) for light and dark themes, or generate one instantly by entering your Your logo below.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Arabic translation conveys a completely different meaning. The English text instructs the user to upload logos with transparent backgrounds or generate one, whereas the Arabic text tells the user to enter their company name and upload a logo to customize the design.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: قم بتحميل شعارات بخلفية شفافة (PNG، SVG، JPG) للمظهرين الفاتح والداكن، أو قم بإنشاء شعار فوراً عن طريق إدخال شعارك أدناه.
